member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Api.PlaybackTraceController
member.summary: Playback Trace export API.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Api.PlaybackTraceController.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Services.PlaybackTraceStore)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Api.PlaybackTraceController.GetEvents(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets recent raw events.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Api.PlaybackTraceController.GetSegments(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets recent watched segments.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Api.PlaybackTraceController.ExportHtml(System.Int32)
member.summary: Exports records as an HTML table report.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Api.PlaybackTraceController.ExportCsv(System.Int32)
member.summary: Exports watched segments as CSV.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Playback Trace plugin configuration.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SeekThresholdSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeline jump threshold used to infer seek events.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.MinimumSegmentSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum segment duration saved to the watched segment file.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SampleIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets how often normal playback progress samples are written.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DefaultExportDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the default number of days included in exports.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.EventMonitorEntryPoint
member.summary: Monitors Jellyfin playback events.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.EventMonitorEntryPoint.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Session.ISessionManager,Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Services.PlaybackTraceStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.EventMonitorEntryPoint})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent
member.summary: A single playback timeline event.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.EventId
member.summary: Gets or sets the event id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.EventType
member.summary: Gets or sets the event type.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the event timestamp.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.SessionKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the session key.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.SessionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin session id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.PlaySessionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the play session id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the user id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.UserName
member.summary: Gets or sets the user name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.ItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the item id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.ItemName
member.summary: Gets or sets the item name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.ItemType
member.summary: Gets or sets the item type.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.ClientName
member.summary: Gets or sets the client name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.DeviceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the device id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.DeviceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the device name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.PositionSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the media position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.FromSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the previous media position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.ToSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the target media position in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.WallDeltaSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the wall-clock delta since the previous event.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.PositionDeltaSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the media-position delta since the previous event.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.IsPaused
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether playback is paused.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.PlaybackTraceEvent.IsAutomated
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Jellyfin generated the event automatically.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment
member.summary: A continuous timeline range that was actually played.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.SegmentId
member.summary: Gets or sets the segment id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.SessionKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the session key.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the user id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.UserName
member.summary: Gets or sets the user name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.ItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the item id.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.ItemName
member.summary: Gets or sets the item name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.ClientName
member.summary: Gets or sets the client name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.DeviceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the device name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.StartSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the segment media start in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.EndSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the segment media end in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.WatchedWallSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the wall-clock seconds spent in this segment.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.ClosedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets why the segment was closed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.StartedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the wall-clock time when the segment started.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Models.WatchedSegment.EndedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the wall-clock time when the segment ended.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Plugin
member.summary: Playback Trace plugin entry.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the plugin instance.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers Playback Trace services with Jellyfin.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.PlaybackTrace.Services.PlaybackTraceStore
member.summary: File-backed storage for playback trace records.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Appends an event.

member.summary: Appends a watched segment.

member.summary: Reads events.

member.summary: Reads watched segments.
